meta.title: Critical Attack Flow Modeling
meta.description:
Bryan Singer is one of the real pioneers in cyber / physical attacks on ICS, and still is on the leading edge in thinking about and figuring out how to stop these attacks.

In this session he introduces his Critical Attack Flow Modeling, including some interesting questions. For example, "what happens if we mess with this?" The model includes looking at the likelihood of attack , likelihood of successful compromise, and likelihood of creating damage.
